## Test plan

- [ ] `make check` passes locally (lint + bats)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for any user-visible behavior change
- [ ] README updated if a new option / placeholder / default
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry added under `[Unreleased]`

## Compatibility

- [ ] No breaking change to existing `@useful-*` option names
- [ ] Default behavior unchanged (or breaking change documented in CHANGELOG)
- [ ] macOS still works
- [ ] Linux still works (if you only have macOS, note this and CI will tell)
